nodes.title: Tunable Soft Equivariance with Guarantees
nodes.summary: 提出可調軟等變性方法，為神經網路引入可控的對稱性，並提供理論保證。

nodes.id: An LP-based Sampling Policy for Multi-Armed Bandits with Side-Observations and Stochastic Availability
nodes.title: An LP-based Sampling Policy for Multi-Armed Bandits with Side-Observations and Stochastic Availability
nodes.summary: 為具備側邊資訊和隨機可用性的多臂老虎機問題，設計基於線性規劃的採樣策略。

nodes.id: Automatic Laplace Collapsed Sampling: Scalable Marginalisation of Latent Parameters via Automatic Differentiation
nodes.title: Automatic Laplace Collapsed Sampling: Scalable Marginalisation of Latent Parameters via Automatic Differentiation
nodes.summary: 透過拉普拉斯近似和自動微分，實現潛在參數的可擴展邊緣化，提升貝氏推斷效率。

nodes.id: Hardware-Aware Tensor Networks for Real-Time Quantum-Inspired Anomaly Detection at Particle Colliders
nodes.title: Hardware-Aware Tensor Networks for Real-Time Quantum-Inspired Anomaly Detection at Particle Colliders
nodes.summary: 利用硬體感知張量網路，實現粒子對撞機中量子啟發的即時異常檢測。

nodes.id: Sustainability Is Not Linear: Quantifying Performance, Energy, and Privacy Trade-offs in On-Device Intelligence
nodes.title: Sustainability Is Not Linear: Quantifying Performance, Energy, and Privacy Trade-offs in On-Device Intelligence
nodes.summary: 量化邊緣AI中性能、能耗和隱私之間的非線性權衡關係。

nodes.id: PQuantML: A Tool for End-to-End Hardware-aware Model Compression
nodes.title: PQuantML: A Tool for End-to-End Hardware-aware Model Compression
nodes.summary: 開發PQuantML工具，實現端到端硬體感知的模型壓縮，優化模型部署。

links.target: Automatic Laplace Collapsed Sampling: Scalable Marginalisation of Latent Parameters via Automatic Differentiation
links.hidden_insight: 兩者都透過利用底層結構來簡化複雜的建模或推斷問題。論文1透過等變性簡化模型架構，減少學習複雜度；論文4則透過拉普拉斯近似簡化貝氏推斷中的邊緣化計算，提高效率。

links.target: Hardware-Aware Tensor Networks for Real-Time Quantum-Inspired Anomaly Detection at Particle Colliders
links.hidden_insight: 兩者都旨在透過利用數據或模型中的結構性規律（如對稱性）來提高效率和表示能力。論文1直接編碼對稱性以構建更魯棒的模型，而論文8的張量網路則透過分解高維張量來捕捉數據的內在相關性與結構，實現高效的表示和計算。

links.source: An LP-based Sampling Policy for Multi-Armed Bandits with Side-Observations and Stochastic Availability
links.target: Sustainability Is Not Linear: Quantifying Performance, Energy, and Privacy Trade-offs in On-Device Intelligence
links.hidden_insight: 兩者都處理在資源受限和不確定性下的優化決策問題。論文3透過線性規劃優化採樣策略以有效利用資源並最大化回報，而論文9則量化了邊緣AI中性能、能耗和隱私等多目標資源權衡，本質上是在有限資源下尋求最佳平衡。

links.source: An LP-based Sampling Policy for Multi-Armed Bandits with Side-Observations and Stochastic Availability
links.target: PQuantML: A Tool for End-to-End Hardware-aware Model Compression
links.hidden_insight: 兩者都涉及在有限資源下進行優化以達成特定目標。論文3透過LP優化採樣策略來有效利用隨機可用的資源，而論文11則透過模型壓縮技術優化AI模型對硬體資源的利用效率，以在資源受限的環境中實現最佳性能。

links.source: Automatic Laplace Collapsed Sampling: Scalable Marginalisation of Latent Parameters via Automatic Differentiation
links.target: Hardware-Aware Tensor Networks for Real-Time Quantum-Inspired Anomaly Detection at Particle Colliders
links.hidden_insight: 兩者都提供處理高維複雜性的結構化方法。論文4透過拉普拉斯近似實現潛在參數的邊緣化，有效降低推斷的維度；論文8的張量網路則透過分解高維張量來捕捉數據的本質結構，實現高效的表示和計算，兩者都旨在提高複雜系統的可擴展性和可處理性。

links.source: Sustainability Is Not Linear: Quantifying Performance, Energy, and Privacy Trade-offs in On-Device Intelligence
links.target: PQuantML: A Tool for End-to-End Hardware-aware Model Compression
links.hidden_insight: 論文9揭示了邊緣AI中性能、能耗和隱私之間的複雜權衡關係，而論文11則提供了一種具體的技術（硬體感知模型壓縮）來實踐性地解決這些權衡，以優化模型在資源受限硬體上的部署和效率。
